illustration_prompt: Strategic house diagram in consulting style. White background. Four-layer house: top gold 'AI 应用层', light blue '知识运营层', blue '知识管理层', dark blue '知识入库层'. Each layer shows capability items. Right: annotation connecting layers to pain points. Bottom foundation: '知识运营 SOP 贯穿全流程'. Clean wireframe, 16:9, 3840x2160.
